coupons_scope_id_check.name: coupons_scope_id_check
coupons_scope_id_check.value: ("coupons"."scope" = 'sitewide' AND "coupons"."scope_id" IS NULL) OR ("coupons"."scope" <> 'sitewide' AND "coupons"."scope_id" IS NOT NULL)

commission_rules_scope_id_check.name: commission_rules_scope_id_check
commission_rules_scope_id_check.value: ("commission_rules"."scope" = 'global' AND "commission_rules"."scope_id" IS NULL) OR ("commission_rules"."scope" <> 'global' AND "commission_rules"."scope_id" IS NOT NULL)
